title: Release Readiness Report
behaviorChanges: No intentional business-logic or route behavior changes in Phase 50.

phaseSummaries.title: Reference standards extraction and engineering contract
phaseSummaries.summary: Defined standards-first refactor rules.

phaseSummaries.title: Architecture baseline and roadmap
phaseSummaries.summary: Established initial safe refactor order.

phaseSummaries.title: Type system split
phaseSummaries.summary: Split type monolith into domain modules with compatibility surface.

phaseSummaries.title: Entrypoint cleanup
phaseSummaries.summary: Centralized style/bootstrap imports.

phaseSummaries.title: Route extraction
phaseSummaries.summary: Moved routes out of App shell.

phaseSummaries.title: Design system foundation
phaseSummaries.summary: Added semantic token layer and Tailwind-compatible token contract.

phaseSummaries.title: Modal standardization
phaseSummaries.summary: Introduced shared dialog shell and consistent modal behavior.

phaseSummaries.title: Table/form consistency
phaseSummaries.summary: Added shared control grammar and aligned field primitives.

phaseSummaries.title: Surface grammar
phaseSummaries.summary: Standardized PageShell/PanelCard/ActionBar surface language.

phaseSummaries.title: Component duplication cleanup
phaseSummaries.summary: Converted duplicate search wrappers and removed demo/unused component.

phaseSummaries.title: Unused utils and legacy CSS quarantine
phaseSummaries.summary: Moved CSS stack to bootstrap and quarantined unused candidates.

phaseSummaries.title: Provider shell extraction
phaseSummaries.summary: Moved provider composition out of entrypoint.

phaseSummaries.summary: Reduced App.tsx to thin composition shell.

phaseSummaries.title: Release readiness report

remainingRisks.note: Settings and reports target debt were cleaned, but full-project legacy TypeScript debt may still exist outside completed scopes.
Do not delete styles/system/legacy-quarantine yet. Only unused-css-candidates may be deleted after visual QA confirms no regressions.
Workbox max cache file size was increased earlier because current CSS/bundle output is large.
Report type contracts were cleaned, but visual/report workflow QA is still required.
Some audits skip TypeScript-backed checks when node_modules/tsc is unavailable. Run strict commands locally.

recommendedReleaseGate: Manual QA on auth, sales, reports, settings, mobile navigation, command palette and PWA install/update.
